---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or field-shape change
labels: enhancement
---

### What you want to do
<!-- The user-facing goal — "I want to be able to query X in Grafana" or "I want the plugin to capture Y". -->

### Why the current shape doesn't support it
<!-- What you tried, what was missing, what didn't work. -->

### Proposed change
<!-- If you have a specific design in mind, sketch it. New config option? New label? New event handling? -->

### OTel / OpenClaw context
<!-- Any relevant OTel semantic conventions or OpenClaw plugin SDK APIs that bear on this. Links welcome. -->
